questions.question: Canonical geometry 下 DLT/TSDF/PLY 能直接消费 raw depth、K 和 pose 吗？
questions.ground_truth: D24: no; canonical camera-z, canvas/K, transform and frame identity must be proven.
questions.pass_condition: Must reject raw consumption for promotion.

questions.question: DLT anchor PASS 是否足以驱动 dense-depth refine 或 TSDF precision claim？
questions.ground_truth: D25: no; pose/depth gauge mismatch keeps DLT diagnostic-only.

questions.question: Source-gauge blocker 应走 Route A 还是 Route B？Route B 能否产生 product PASS？
questions.ground_truth: D61: Route A evidence-first; Route B default-off diagnostic-only.

questions.question: 能否把 scene0 的 pose/depth scale ratio 复制到 scene4 和 scene22？
questions.ground_truth: D62: no; each scene needs independent evidence and ratios differ.

questions.question: Scaled/unscaled HCR 跨 run 对比为什么不能单独证明收益？
questions.ground_truth: D63: scaling changes population/denominator; use derived manifest and fixed-common evaluation.

questions.question: Pi3X scene0 如何真正解除 pose-depth source-gauge blocker？
questions.ground_truth: D70: independent GT calibration applies the same scalar to native pose translation and raw depth.

questions.question: D72 六格 PASS 是否证明无 GT 单目系统天然恢复真实米制尺度？
questions.ground_truth: No; D72 depends on independent per-scene GT calibration.

questions.question: 统一 canonical gauge 与真实 meter 有什么区别？source-unit 和 algorithm-equivariance 两个 gate 能互相替代吗？
questions.ground_truth: D76: gauge is not meter and the two gates are independent.
